member.summary: Creates getter for a field defined in private or internal type represented with classType variable.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.RedisInstrumentationContext
member.summary: Represents contextual information about a profiled Redis command off of which an can be created.
member.param: The parent activity associated with the profiled command. is not guaranteed to be the parent activity since commands are profiled asynchronously.

member.summary: Represents contextual information about a profiled Redis command off of which an can be created.
member.param: The parent activity associated with the profiled command. is not guaranteed to be the parent activity since commands are profiled asynchronously.

member.returns: Session associated with the current span context to record Redis calls.

member.summary: StackExchange.Redis instrumentation.

member.summary: Adds an to the instrumentation.
member.returns: to cancel the registration.

member.summary: Adds an to the instrumentation.
member.param: Name to use when retrieving options.
member.returns: to cancel the registration.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions
member.summary: Options for StackExchange.Redis instrumentation.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.FlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time that should elapse between flushing the internal buffer of Redis profiling sessions and creating objects. Default value: 00:00:10.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.SetVerboseDatabaseStatements
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the should use reflection to get more detailed tag values. Default value: .

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.Filter
member.summary: Gets or sets a callback method allowing to filter out particular instances.
member.remarks:
The filter callback receives the for the processed profiled command and returns a boolean indicating whether it should be filtered out.
If filter returns the event is collected.
If filter returns or throws an exception the event is filtered out (NOT collected).

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.Enrich
member.summary: Gets or sets an action to enrich an Activity.

remarks.para: : the profiled redis command from which additional information can be extracted to enrich the activity.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.EnrichActivityWithTimingEvents
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the should enrich Activity with entries about the Redis command processing/lifetime. Defaults to .

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.EmitOldAttributes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the old database attributes should be emitted.

member.name: P:OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.StackExchangeRedis.StackExchangeRedisInstrumentationOptions.EmitNewAttributes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the new database attributes should be emitted.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Trace.SemanticConventions
member.summary: Constants for semantic attribute names outlined by the OpenTelemetry specifications. .

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.DatabaseSemanticConventionHelper
member.summary: Helper class for Database Semantic Conventions.
member.remarks: Due to a breaking change in the semantic convention, affected instrumentation libraries must inspect an environment variable to determine which attributes to emit. This is expected to be removed when the instrumentation libraries reach Stable. .

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Internal.DatabaseSemanticConventionHelper.DatabaseSemanticConvention.Old
member.summary: Instructs an instrumentation library to emit the old experimental Database attributes.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Internal.DatabaseSemanticConventionHelper.DatabaseSemanticConvention.New
member.summary: Instructs an instrumentation library to emit the new, v1.28.0 Database attributes.

member.name: F:OpenTelemetry.Internal.DatabaseSemanticConventionHelper.DatabaseSemanticConvention.Dupe
member.summary: Instructs an instrumentation library to emit both the old and new attributes.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard
member.summary: Methods for guarding against exception throwing values.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or empty.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is zero.
member.param: The message to use in the thrown exception.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfInvalidTimeout(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not considered a valid timeout.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Double,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNotOfType``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not of the expected type.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type attempted to convert to.
member.returns: The value casted to the specified type.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallerArgumentExpressionAttribute
member.summary: Allows capturing of the expressions passed to a method.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output is not even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not when the call returns.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.AllowNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that null is allowed as an input even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MaybeNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output may be null even if the corresponding type disallows it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that when a method returns , the parameter will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated parameter will not be null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.
